title: AppState cache fields are pub; invariant breakable from outside apply_event
description: AppState.chats, messages, chat_display, and message_bodies are all pub. The cache invariant (chat_display must be rebuilt after chats mutates; message_bodies must be rebuilt after messages mutates) is documented in field comments but not enforced by visibility. main.rs already bypasses the full apply_event path to call messages.clear() and message_bodies.clear() directly (lines 142-143). A future contributor who mutates self.state.chats directly without calling rebuild_chat_display() will produce a stale display with no compile-time error. — Maintenance consequence: stale cache bugs that are invisible until runtime; hard to audit as the codebase grows.
